description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add an rspec job that runs gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, then bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}", then bundle exec rspec, and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on rspec, runs mkdir public and mv coverage/ public/coverage, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
